claims.summary: Verify phase-transition cards require confidence, trigger, and why-now evidence to make false alarms inspectable.
Implement a relational phase card when isolated reflective modes become inbox-forced direct Dialogue.
Keep MomentCapture explicit rather than auto-triggering it from a language-only relational card.
Any phase-derived pressure, porosity, weighting, mode control, or behavioral influence remains Tier 5 pending Mike/operator approval.
